title: Budget Deadlock — Automatic Continuing Resolution
description: Congress fails to pass appropriations legislation by October 1. The automatic continuing resolution takes effect at 98% of prior-year enacted levels under Article II Section 12.2. The executive branch then attempts to manipulate funding ratios under the CR — withholding funds from disfavored programs and redirecting them to preferred ones. The scenario tests whether courts can block this manipulation on an expedited basis.
